Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate Actions For Purpose Of Discovery And Trial
Off Calendar Sep-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. KATRINA M. SALEEN, ESQ. of Broderick Saleen Law Firm, Tel No. 650-857-9000 appearing for the Plaintiffs;
Atty. PHILIP T. KILDUFF, ESQ., Tel No. 415-673-0368 specially appearing for Defendant Daniel Lopez.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court modified its tentative ruling and ordered as follows: PLAINTIFFS TIMOTHY BRODERICK, BRODERICK SALEEN LAW FIRM'S Motion To Consolidate Actions is granted. Consolidation is for all purposes. Case No. CGC-13531107 is designated as the lead case. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
